message:
feat(stats,storage): major stats command expansion with additional metrics and storage query improvements

- Major expansion of stats command (~389 lines) with additional
  aggregate metrics, distribution analysis, and structured output
  formatting for project health reporting
- Expand SQLite storage with additional query methods for stats
  aggregation
- Storage module export adjustments
- Expand e2e concurrency tests with additional multi-agent scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
